creator: chris@aims.com.au
text:
Change maintainer for firebird. I have Geoff's approval for this.
I plan on submitting some fixes for Firebird which will clear out the currently
open PRs and fix the package installation at FreeBSD install time.
I also plan on submitting a firebird-devel port for later, less stable versions
of the Firebird codebase.

Fix: 

-MAINTAINER=	geoff@sea-incorporated.com
+MAINTAINER=	chris@aims.com.au

 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/interbase
 INSTALLS_SHLIB=	yes--UkzU6SqHJeFSgozGv82zlKJv2qCtkIFqOmP7SQpV344MRlyf
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: Makefile

+++ Makefile	2001/11/30 00:38:36

 		interbase0.9-4-v5examples.tar.gz \
 		interbase0.9-4src.tar.gz
